name: Checks Cashed Loans
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers payday loans, installment loans, title loans, and check cashing services at their Stafford, TX location with same-day funding options for emergency cash needs.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across the United States, including a Stafford, Texas branch at 11715 W Bellfort St. The company has been serving consumers seeking quick access to emergency cash for decades. Their Stafford location operates extended hours (9 AM–8 PM weekdays, 9 AM–6 PM Saturday) to accommodate working customers needing immediate financial assistance. The company combines traditional check-cashing services with modern lending products and prepaid banking options. ACE Cash Express offers multiple short-term loan products designed to bridge financial gaps between paychecks. Their primary offerings include payday loans ($100–$2,000 online), installment loans with longer repayment terms ($100–$2,500), and title loans using vehicle collateral ($100–$5,000). Beyond lending, they provide check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payment services, and ATM access. They have also expanded into prepaid banking through products like the Porte mobile banking app and ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit cards, partnering with Pathward, N.A. for deposit accounts. What distinguishes ACE Cash Express is their hybrid model combining in-store personal service with online application options and their breadth of ancillary financial services beyond loans. They offer tax preparation services and business services alongside consumer lending. The company maintains a significant physical footprint allowing customers to complete transactions in person, which appeals to those preferring face-to-face financial interactions. However, as a payday and title lender, ACE operates in a high-cost borrowing segment. Their products carry substantially higher APRs than traditional banks, making them suitable only for genuine emergency situations. The company is transparent about product terms on their website, but borrowers should carefully evaluate the true cost of short-term loans before applying. Title loans carry particular risk as they require vehicle collateral, meaning default could result in vehicle repossession.
address: 11715 W Bellfort Ave D, Stafford, TX 77477

company_info.headquarters: 11715 W Bellfort Ave D, Stafford, TX 77477

pros: Extended store hours (9 AM–8 PM weekdays, 6 PM Saturday) for working customers needing emergency access
Multiple loan products available ($100–$5,000 range) with online and in-store application options
Same-day or next-day funding available for approved payday and installment loans
Payday loans available online without requiring a store visit
Comprehensive financial services including check cashing, bill payment, money transfers, and tax services
Prepaid banking options (Porte app, ACE Elite card) for customers without traditional bank accounts
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms than standard payday loans
cons: Payday and title loans carry high APRs typical of the industry, making them very expensive short-term borrowing
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating risk of vehicle repossession upon default
Payday loans require full repayment on next payday, which can trap borrowers in debt cycles if unable to repay
Limited transparency on specific APR, fees, and terms on the website—customers must apply or visit in-person for full pricing
Closed Sundays, limiting weekend access compared to some competitors
best_for: Workers facing unexpected emergencies (medical, car repair, utility bills) needing funds before next paycheck
Unbanked or underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank loans or credit
Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs who can safely pledge vehicle title as collateral
Customers preferring in-person service and face-to-face financial transactions over online-only lenders
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for working individuals facing genuine financial emergencies who need immediate cash access and prefer in-person service over online-only lenders. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are expensive borrowing options suitable only for short-term gaps—they should never be viewed as regular financial solutions, as their high APRs and structured repayment terms can create harmful debt cycles.
services: Porte Mobile Banking App (FDIC-insured via Pathward)
ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card
